<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection\Types; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\Fqsen; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\Type; /** * Value Object representing the type 'string'. * * @psalm-immutable */ final class InterfaceString implements Type { /** @var Fqsen|null */ private $fqsen; /** * Initializes this representation of a class string with the given Fqsen. */ public function __construct(?Fqsen $fqsen = null) { $this->fqsen = $fqsen; } /** * Returns the FQSEN associated with this object. */ public function getFqsen(): ?Fqsen { return $this->fqsen; } /** * Returns a rendered output of the Type as it would be used in a DocBlock. */ public function __toString(): string { if ($this->fqsen === null) { return 'interface-string'; } return 'interface-string<' . (string) $this->fqsen . '>'; } }
